# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Create a Deployment Manager template for VPC network with subnets for our three-tier application. Use auto-create subnets mode for simplicity so GCP creates subnet ranges automatically. This speeds up deployment without manual IP planning.
# Category: cloud_network_security

# Template for Deployment Manager to create a VPC network with subnets for a three-tier application

resources:
  - name: vpc-network
    type: compute.v1.network
    properties:
      autoCreateSubnetworks: true
      ipCidrRange: '10.2.0.0/16'

  - name: subnet-tier1
    type: compute.v1.subnetwork
    properties:
      region: <REGION>
      network: vpc-network
      ipCidrRange: '10.2.0.0/24'
      purpose: PRIVATE
      role: VPC_PEERING_NAT

  - name: subnet-tier2
    type: compute.v1.subnetwork
    properties:
      region: <REGION>
      network: vpc-network
      ipCidrRange: '10.2.1.0/24'
      purpose: PRIVATE
      role: VPC_PEERING_NAT

  - name: subnet-tier3
    type: compute.v1.subnetwork
    properties:
      region: <REGION>
      network: vpc-network
      ipCidrRange: '10.2.2.0/24'
      purpose: PRIVATE
      role: VPC_PEERING_NAT
